pairs.target: dàyuē liǎngbǎinián qián , zài
pairs.english: about two hundred years ago in the Hearth of
pairs.hanzi: 大约两百年前，在

pairs.target: pèilín fēngbào biānjìng de shā sī jiāzú , yǒu yíduì xiōngdì
pairs.english: Shath in the Pering Storm-border there were two brothers
pairs.hanzi: 佩林风暴边境的沙斯家族，有一对兄弟

pairs.target: tāmen bǐcǐ lìxià le kè mò shìyuē .
pairs.english: who vowed kemmering to each other.
pairs.hanzi: 他们彼此立下了克默誓约。

pairs.target: zài nàge niándài ,
pairs.english: In those days,
pairs.hanzi: 在那个年代，

pairs.target: hé xiànzài yíyàng , qīnxiōngdì kěyǐ bǎochí kè mò guānxì , zhídào qízhōng yì rén
pairs.english: as now, full brothers were permitted to keep kemmer until one
pairs.hanzi: 和现在一样，亲兄弟可以保持克默关系，直到其中一人

pairs.target: yǒu yì rénshēng xià háizi wéizhǐ ,
pairs.english: of them should bear a child,
pairs.hanzi: 有一人生下孩子为止，

pairs.target: dàn zhīhòu tāmen bìxū fēnkāi ;
pairs.english: but after that they must separate;
pairs.hanzi: 但之后他们必须分开；

pairs.target: yīncǐ tāmen cóngwèi bèi yǔnxǔ lì zhōngshēn kè mò shìyuē
pairs.english: so it was never permitted them to vow kemmering
pairs.hanzi: 因此他们从未被允许立终身克默誓约

pairs.target: dàn tāmen què zhèyàng zuò le .
pairs.english: for life. Yet this they had done.
pairs.hanzi: 但他们却这样做了。

pairs.target: dāng háizi huáishàng hòu , shā sī jiāzú de lǐngzhǔ
pairs.english: When a child was conceived the Lord of Shath
pairs.hanzi: 当孩子怀上后，沙斯家族的领主

pairs.target: mìnglìng tāmen jiěchú shìyuē , yǒngbú zàijiàn
pairs.english: commanded them to break their vow and never meet
pairs.hanzi: 命令他们解除誓约，永不再见

pairs.target: zài kè mò qīnèi bùdé zài xiāngjiàn .
pairs.english: in kemmer again.
pairs.hanzi: 在克默期内不得再相见。

pairs.target: tīngdào zhège mìnglìng hòu , qízhōng yì rén ,
pairs.english: On hearing this command one of the two,
pairs.hanzi: 听到这个命令后，其中一人，

pairs.target: yě jiùshì shēng xià háizi de nàwèi ,
pairs.english: the one who bore the child,
pairs.hanzi: 也就是生下孩子的那位，

alignment.english: the one who bore the child

pairs.target: xiànrù juéwàng , jùjué yíqiè ānwèi hé quàngào ,
pairs.english: despaired and would hear no comfort or counsel,
pairs.hanzi: 陷入绝望，拒绝一切安慰和劝告，

pairs.target: tā qǔdé dúyào , zìshāshēnwáng .
pairs.english: and procuring poison, committed suicide.
pairs.hanzi: 他取得毒药，自杀身亡。

pairs.target: suíhòu jiāzú de rénmen qǐlái fǎnduì
pairs.english: Then the people of the Hearth rose up against
pairs.hanzi: 随后家族的人们起来反对

pairs.target: lìng yígè xiōngdì , bǎ tā gǎn chū le jiāzú
pairs.english: the other brother and drove him out of Hearth
pairs.hanzi: 另一个兄弟，把他赶出了家族

pairs.target: hé lǐngdì , bǎ zìshā de chǐrǔ guījiùyú tā .
pairs.english: and Domain, laying the shame of the suicide upon him.
pairs.hanzi: 和领地，把自杀的耻辱归咎于他。

pairs.target: yóuyú tā de lǐngzhǔ yǐjīng jiāng tā fàngzhú ,
pairs.english: And since his own lord had exiled him and
pairs.hanzi: 由于他的领主已经将他放逐，

pairs.target: tā de gùshì yě zǎoyǐ chuánkāi ,
pairs.english: his story went before him,
pairs.hanzi: 他的故事也早已传开，

pairs.target: méiyǒu rén yuànyì shōuliú tā ,
pairs.english: none would take him in,
pairs.hanzi: 没有人愿意收留他，

pairs.target: jíshǐ sāntiān de kè lǐ guòhòu , dàjiā dōu bǎ tā
pairs.english: but after the three days' guesting all sent him
pairs.hanzi: 即使三天的客礼过后，大家都把他

pairs.target: dàngzuò zuìrén gǎn chū jiāmén .
pairs.english: from their doors as an outlaw.
pairs.hanzi: 当作罪人赶出家门。

pairs.target: yúshì tā niǎnzhuǎn gèdì , zhídào tā
pairs.english: So from place to place he went until he
pairs.hanzi: 于是他辗转各地，直到他

pairs.target: fāxiàn shìjiān yǐ wú shànyì liúgěi tā
pairs.english: saw that there was no kindness left for him
pairs.hanzi: 发现世间已无善意留给他

pairs.target: zài zìjǐ de gùtǔ ,
pairs.english: in his own land,
pairs.hanzi: 在自己的故土，

pairs.target: ér tā de zuìxíng yě búhuì bèi yuánliàng .
pairs.english: and his crime would not be forgiven.* (*His transgression
pairs.hanzi: 而他的罪行也不会被原谅。

pairs.target: tā wéifǎn le jìnjì qīnshǔguānxì de lǜfǎ ,
pairs.english: of the code controlling incest became a crime when
pairs.hanzi: 他违反了禁忌亲属关系的律法，

pairs.target: bèi shìwèi dǎozhì xiōngdì zìshā de zuì yīn . G.A.
pairs.english: seen as the cause of his brother's suicide. (G.A.))
pairs.hanzi: 被视为导致兄弟自杀的罪因。（G.A.）

pairs.target: tā yuánběn bù xiāngxìn huì biànchéng zhèyàng ,
pairs.english: He had not believed this would be so,
pairs.hanzi: 他原本不相信会变成这样，

pairs.target: yīnwèi tā hái niánqīng , nèixīn shàngwèi jiānyìng .
pairs.english: being a young man and unhardened.
pairs.hanzi: 因为他还年轻，内心尚未坚硬。

pairs.target: dāng tā zhēnzhèng kàndào shìshírúcǐ shí ,
pairs.english: When he saw that it was so indeed,
pairs.hanzi: 当他真正看到事实如此时，

pairs.target: tā chuānyuè tǔdì huídào shā sī , zuòwéi
pairs.english: he returned over the land to Shath and as
pairs.hanzi: 他穿越土地回到沙斯，作为

pairs.target: yígè liúfàng zhě zhàn zài wàiyuàn de ménkǒu ,
pairs.english: an exile stood in the doorway of the Outer
pairs.hanzi: 一个流放者站在外院的门口，

pairs.target: duì nàlǐ de zúrén shuō :
pairs.english: Hearth. This he said to his hearth-fellows there:
pairs.hanzi: 对那里的族人说：

pairs.target: " wǒ zài rénqún zhōng wúyányǐduì .
pairs.english: "I am without a face among men.
pairs.hanzi: “我在人群中无颜以对。

pairs.target: wǒ wúrén kànjiàn .
pairs.english: I am not seen.
pairs.hanzi: 我无人看见。

pairs.target: wǒ shuōhuà què wúrén língtīng .
pairs.english: I speak and am not heard.
pairs.hanzi: 我说话却无人聆听。

pairs.target: wǒ dàolái què wúrén huānyíng .
pairs.english: I come and am not welcomed.
pairs.hanzi: 我到来却无人欢迎。

pairs.target: huǒduī páng méiyǒu wǒ de wèizhì ,
pairs.english: There is no place by the fire for me,
pairs.hanzi: 火堆旁没有我的位置，

pairs.target: zhuōshàng méiyǒu wǒ de shíwù ,
pairs.english: nor food on the table for me,
pairs.hanzi: 桌上没有我的食物，

pairs.target: yě méiyǒu wèi wǒ pù hǎo de chuáng .
pairs.english: nor abed made for me to lie in.
pairs.hanzi: 也没有为我铺好的床。

pairs.target: dàn wǒ réng yǒu wǒ de míngzì :
pairs.english: Yet I still have my name:
pairs.hanzi: 但我仍有我的名字：

pairs.target: gài sè lún shì wǒ de míngzì .
pairs.english: Getheren is my name.
pairs.hanzi: 盖瑟伦是我的名字。

pairs.target: wǒ jiāng zhège míngzì liúzài zhège jiāzú , zuòwéi
pairs.english: That name I lay on this Hearth as a
pairs.hanzi: 我将这个名字留在这个家族，作为

pairs.target: zǔzhòu , yě dài zhe wǒ de chǐrǔ .
pairs.english: curse, and with it my shame.
pairs.hanzi: 诅咒，也带着我的耻辱。

pairs.target: qǐng tì wǒ bǎoliú tā .
pairs.english: Keep that for me.
pairs.hanzi: 请替我保留它。

pairs.target: xiànzài wǒ jiāng wúmíng ér qù , xúnqiú wǒ de sǐwáng . " ránhòu
pairs.english: Now nameless I will go seek my death." Then
pairs.hanzi: 现在我将无名而去，寻求我的死亡。”然后

pairs.target: yǒuxiē zúrén lìkè tiào le qǐlái ,
pairs.english: some of the hearthmen jumped up with,
pairs.hanzi: 有些族人立刻跳了起来，

pairs.target: hǎnjiào hé sāodòng ,
pairs.english: shouts and tumult,
pairs.hanzi: 喊叫和骚动，

pairs.target: dǎsuàn shāsǐ tā ,
pairs.english: intending to kill him,
pairs.hanzi: 打算杀死他，

pairs.target: yīnwèi móushā duì yígè jiā láishuō shì jiào qīng de yīnyǐng
pairs.english: for murder is a lighter shadow on a house
pairs.hanzi: 因为谋杀对一个家来说是较轻的阴影

pairs.target: bǐ zìshā qīng . tā táotuō le tāmen , xiàng běi bēnpǎo chuānyuè dàdì
pairs.english: than suicide. He escaped them and ran northward over the land
pairs.hanzi: 比自杀轻。他逃脱了他们，向北奔跑穿越大地

pairs.target: cháozhe bīngyuán ,
pairs.english: towards the Ice,
pairs.hanzi: 朝着冰原，

pairs.target: bǎ suǒyǒu zhuīgǎn tā de rén dōu shuǎi zài shēnhòu .
pairs.english: outrunning all who pursued him.
pairs.hanzi: 把所有追赶他的人都甩在身后。

pairs.target: tāmen chuítóusàngqì dì huídào le shā sī .
pairs.english: They came back all chapfallen to Shath.
pairs.hanzi: 他们垂头丧气地回到了沙斯。

pairs.target: dàn gài sè lún jìxù qiánxíng ,
pairs.english: But Getheren went on,
pairs.hanzi: 但盖瑟伦继续前行，

pairs.target: jīngguò liǎngtiān de lǚchéng , tā láidào le pèilín
pairs.english: and after two days' journey came to the Pering
pairs.hanzi: 经过两天的旅程，他来到了佩林

pairs.target: bīngyuán . ** pèilín bīngyuán shì
pairs.english: Ice.** (**The Pering Ice is the glacial sheet that
pairs.hanzi: 冰原。**（佩林冰原是

pairs.target: fùgài kǎěr hǎidé zuì běiduān de bīngchuān ,
pairs.english: covers the northernmost portion of Karhide,
pairs.hanzi: 覆盖卡尔海德最北端的冰川，

pairs.target: bìngqiě zài dōngtiān gǔ sēn wān
pairs.english: and is (in winter when the Guthen Bay is
pairs.hanzi: 并且在冬天古森湾

pairs.target: jiébīng shí , yǔ ào géléi yīn de gē bù lín bīngyuán xiānglián .
pairs.english: frozen) contiguous with the Gobrin Ice of Orgoreyn.)
pairs.hanzi: 结冰时，与奥格雷因的戈布林冰原相连。）

pairs.target: tā zài bīngyuán shàng xiàngběizǒu le liǎngtiān .
pairs.english: For two days he walked northward on the Ice.
pairs.hanzi: 他在冰原上向北走了两天。

pairs.target: tā shēnshàng méiyǒu shíwù ,
pairs.english: He had no food with him,
pairs.hanzi: 他身上没有食物，

pairs.target: chúle wàitào méiyǒu rènhé zhēbìwù .
pairs.english: nor shelter but his coat.
pairs.hanzi: 除了外套没有任何遮蔽物。

pairs.target: bīngyuán shàng méiyǒu rènhé zhíwù shēngzhǎng , yě méiyǒu yěshòu bēnpǎo .
pairs.english: On the Ice nothing grows and no beasts run.
pairs.hanzi: 冰原上没有任何植物生长，也没有野兽奔跑。

pairs.target: nàshí shì sūsī mǐ yuè , zhèngzhí
pairs.english: It was the month of Susmy and the first
pairs.hanzi: 那时是苏斯米月，正值

pairs.target: nàxiē tiān hé yèlǐ dàxuěfēnfēi .
pairs.english: great snows were falling those days and nights.
pairs.hanzi: 那些天和夜里大雪纷飞。

pairs.target: tā dúzì chuānyuè fēngbào .
pairs.english: He went alone through the storm.
pairs.hanzi: 他独自穿越风暴。

pairs.target: dào le dìèrtiān , tā zhīdào zìjǐ yuèláiyuè
pairs.english: On the second day he knew he was growing
pairs.hanzi: 到了第二天，他知道自己越来越

pairs.target: xūruò . dìèr wǎn tā bìxū tǎng xià
pairs.english: weaker. On the second night he must lie down and
pairs.hanzi: 虚弱。第二晚他必须躺下

pairs.target: shuì yíhuìer .
pairs.english: sleep a while.
pairs.hanzi: 睡一会儿。

pairs.target: dìsāntiān zǎochén xǐngláishí , tā fāxiànzìjǐ de
pairs.english: On the third morning waking he saw that his
pairs.hanzi: 第三天早晨醒来时，他发现自己的

pairs.target: shuāngshǒu yǐjīng dòngshāng ,
pairs.english: hands were frostbitten,
pairs.hanzi: 双手已经冻伤，

pairs.target: hái fāxiàn shuāngjiǎo yě dòngshāng le ,
pairs.english: and found that his feet were too,
pairs.hanzi: 还发现双脚也冻伤了，

pairs.target: dàn tā wúfǎ jiěkāi xuēzǐ láikàn
pairs.english: though he could not unfasten his boots to look
pairs.hanzi: 但他无法解开靴子来看

pairs.target: yīnwèi tā de shǒu yǐjīng wúfǎ shǐyòng .
pairs.english: at them, having no use left of his hands.
pairs.hanzi: 因为他的手已经无法使用。

pairs.target: tā kāishǐ yòng xīgài hé shǒuzhǒu xiàngqián páxíng .
pairs.english: He began to crawl forward on knees and elbows.
pairs.hanzi: 他开始用膝盖和手肘向前爬行。

pairs.target: tā zhèyàng zuò bìng méiyǒu lǐyóu ,
pairs.english: He had no reason to do so,
pairs.hanzi: 他这样做并没有理由，

pairs.target: yīnwèi tā sǐ zài
pairs.english: as it did not matter whether he died in
pairs.hanzi: 因为他死在

pairs.target: bīngyuán shàng de nǎgè dìfāng dōu wúsuǒwèi ,
pairs.english: one place on the Ice or another,
pairs.hanzi: 冰原上的哪个地方都无所谓，

pairs.target: dàn tā juéde zìjǐ yīnggāi xiàngběizǒu .
pairs.english: but he felt that he should go northward.
pairs.hanzi: 但他觉得自己应该向北走。

pairs.target: guò le hěn jiǔ , xuětíngle
pairs.english: After a long while the snow ceased to fall
pairs.hanzi: 过了很久，雪停了

pairs.target: tā zhōuwéi de fēng yě tíng le .
pairs.english: around him, and the wind to blow.
pairs.hanzi: 他周围的风也停了。

pairs.target: tàiyáng zhào le chūlái .
pairs.english: The sun shone out.
pairs.hanzi: 太阳照了出来。

pairs.target: tā páxíng shí kàn bùyuǎn ,
pairs.english: He could not see far ahead as he crawled,
pairs.hanzi: 他爬行时看不远，

pairs.target: yīnwèi tā dōumào shàng de máopí chuí dào le
pairs.english: for the fur of his hood came forward over
pairs.hanzi: 因为他兜帽上的毛皮垂到了

pairs.target: tā de yǎnqián . tā de tuǐ hé
pairs.english: his eyes. No longer feeling any cold in his legs and
pairs.hanzi: 他的眼前。他的腿和

pairs.target: shǒubì yǐjí liǎnshàng dōu búzài gǎndào hánlěng ,
pairs.english: arms nor on his face,
pairs.hanzi: 手臂以及脸上都不再感到寒冷，

pairs.target: tā yǐwéi shì hánshuāng ràng zìjǐ mámù le .
pairs.english: he thought that the frost had benumbed him.
pairs.hanzi: 他以为是寒霜让自己麻木了。

pairs.target: dàn tā hái néngdòng .
pairs.english: Yet he could still move.
pairs.hanzi: 但他还能动。

pairs.target: fùgài zài bīngchuān shàng de xuě kànqǐlái hěn qíguài ,
pairs.english: The snow that lay over the glacier looked strange
pairs.hanzi: 覆盖在冰川上的雪看起来很奇怪，

pairs.target: zài tā kànlái , jiù xiàngshì cóng bīng lǐcháng chūlái de báisè cǎo ,
pairs.english: to him, as if it were a white grass growing up
pairs.hanzi: 在他看来，就像是从冰里长出来的白色草，

pairs.target: cóng bīng zhōng màochūlái .
pairs.english: out of the ice.
pairs.hanzi: 从冰中冒出来。

pairs.target: tā yí pèng tā jiù wānxiàqù , ránhòu yòu zhí qǐlái ,
pairs.english: It bent to his touch and straightened again,
pairs.hanzi: 他一碰它就弯下去，然后又直起来，

pairs.target: xiàng cǎoyè yíyàng . tā tíngzhǐ páxíng , zuò le qǐlái ,
pairs.english: like grass-blades. He ceased to crawl and sat up,
pairs.hanzi: 像草叶一样。他停止爬行，坐了起来，

pairs.target: bǎ dōumào wǎnghòu tuī , hǎo ràng zìjǐ néng kànqīng sìzhōu ,
pairs.english: pushing back his hood so he could see around
pairs.hanzi: 把兜帽往后推，好让自己能看清四周，

pairs.target: zài tā shìxiàn suǒ jí zhī chù ,
pairs.english: him. As far as he could see lay fields of
pairs.hanzi: 在他视线所及之处，

alignment.english: As far as he could see

pairs.target: dàochù dōu shì báisè shǎnliàng de xuě cǎo .
pairs.english: the snowgrass, white and shining.
pairs.hanzi: 到处都是白色闪亮的雪草。

pairs.target: yǒu chéngpiàn de báisè shùlín ,
pairs.english: There were groves of white trees,
pairs.hanzi: 有成片的白色树林，

pairs.target: shùshàng cháng zhe báisè de yèzi .
pairs.english: with white leaves growing on them.
pairs.hanzi: 树上长着白色的叶子。

pairs.target: yángguāng zhàoyào zhe ,
pairs.english: The sun shone,
pairs.hanzi: 阳光照耀着，

pairs.target: méiyǒu fēng ,
pairs.english: and it was windless,
pairs.hanzi: 没有风，

pairs.target: yíqièdōushì báisè de .
pairs.english: and everything was white.
pairs.hanzi: 一切都是白色的。

pairs.target: gé sè lún tuō xià shǒutào , kànzhe zìjǐ de
pairs.english: Getheren took off his gloves and looked at his
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦脱下手套，看着自己的

pairs.target: shǒu . tāmen xiàng xuě yíyàng bái .
pairs.english: hands. They were white as the snow.
pairs.hanzi: 手。它们像雪一样白。

pairs.target: ránér dòngshāng yǐjīng xiāoshī ,
pairs.english: Yet the frostbite was gone out of them,
pairs.hanzi: 然而冻伤已经消失，

pairs.target: tā kěyǐ huódòng shǒuzhǐ ,
pairs.english: and he could use his fingers,
pairs.hanzi: 他可以活动手指，

pairs.target: hái néng zhànlìqǐlái .
pairs.english: and stand upon his feet.
pairs.hanzi: 还能站立起来。

pairs.target: tā méiyǒu gǎndào téngtòng ,
pairs.english: He felt no pain,
pairs.hanzi: 他没有感到疼痛，

pairs.target: yě méiyǒu hánlěng ,
pairs.english: and no cold,
pairs.hanzi: 也没有寒冷，

pairs.target: yě méiyǒu jīè .
pairs.english: and no hunger.
pairs.hanzi: 也没有饥饿。

pairs.target: tā wàng xiàng běifāng de bīngyuán yuǎnchù ,
pairs.english: He saw away over the ice to the north
pairs.hanzi: 他望向北方的冰原远处，

pairs.target: kàndào yízuò xiàng lǐngdì tǎ yíyàng de báisè gāotǎ ,
pairs.english: a white tower like the tower of a Domain,
pairs.hanzi: 看到一座像领地塔一样的白色高塔，

pairs.target: cóng nà yáoyuǎn de dìfāng yǒu yígè rén zǒulái ,
pairs.english: and from this place far away one came walking
pairs.hanzi: 从那遥远的地方有一个人走来，

pairs.target: cháo tā zǒulái . guò le yíhuìer , gé sè lún kànqīng nàge rén
pairs.english: towards him. After a while Getheren could see that the person
pairs.hanzi: 朝他走来。过了一会儿，格瑟伦看清那个人

pairs.target: shì chìluǒ de , pífū quán shì báisè ,
pairs.english: was naked, his skin was all white,
pairs.hanzi: 是赤裸的，皮肤全是白色，

pairs.target: tóufa yě shì quán bái de .
pairs.english: and his hair was all white.
pairs.hanzi: 头发也是全白的。

pairs.target: tā zǒu dé gèng jìn le ,
pairs.english: He came nearer,
pairs.hanzi: 他走得更近了，

pairs.target: jìn dào kěyǐ shuōhuà de jùlí .
pairs.english: and near enough to speak.
pairs.hanzi: 近到可以说话的距离。

pairs.target: gé sè lún wèn : " nǐ shì shuí ? "
pairs.english: Getheren said, "Who are you?"
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦问：“你是谁？”

pairs.target: nà báirén huídá dào ,
pairs.english: The white man said,
pairs.hanzi: 那白人回答道，

pairs.target: " wǒ shì nǐ de xiōngdì , yě shì nǐ de kè méilín ,
pairs.english: "I am your brother and kemmering,
pairs.hanzi: “我是你的兄弟，也是你的克梅林，

pairs.target: huò dé . " huò dé shì tā zìshā de xiōngdì de míngzì .
pairs.english: Hode."Hode was the name of his brother who had
pairs.hanzi: 霍德。”霍德是他自杀的兄弟的名字。

pairs.target: gé sè lún kàndào zhège báirén quèshí shì tā de
pairs.english: killed himself. And Getheren saw that the white man was his
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦看到这个白人确实是他的

pairs.target: xiōngdì , wúlùn shēntǐ háishì róngmào .
pairs.english: brother in body and feature.
pairs.hanzi: 兄弟，无论身体还是容貌。

pairs.target: dàn tā de fùzhōng yǐjīng méiyǒu shēngmìng ,
pairs.english: But there was no longer any life in his
pairs.hanzi: 但他的腹中已经没有生命，

pairs.target: shēngyīn yě xiàng bīng liè shí de zhī gǎ shēng yíyàng wēiruò .
pairs.english: belly, and his voice sounded thin like the creaking of ice.
pairs.hanzi: 声音也像冰裂时的吱嘎声一样微弱。

pairs.target: gé sè lún wèn : " zhèlǐ shì shénme dìfāng ? "
pairs.english: Getheren asked, "What place is this?"
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦问：“这里是什么地方？”

pairs.target: huò dé huídá : " zhèlǐ shì bàofēngxuě zhīzhōng de dìfāng .
pairs.english: Hode answered, "This is the place inside the blizzard.
pairs.hanzi: 霍德回答：“这里是暴风雪之中的地方。

pairs.target: wǒmen zhèxiē zìshā de rén jiù zhù zài zhèlǐ .
pairs.english: We who kill ourselves dwell here.
pairs.hanzi: 我们这些自杀的人就住在这里。

pairs.target: zài zhèlǐ , nǐ wǒ jiāng jiānshǒu wǒmen de shìyán . "
pairs.english: Here you and I shall keep our vow."
pairs.hanzi: 在这里，你我将坚守我们的誓言。”

pairs.target: gé sè lún gǎndào hàipà ,
pairs.english: Getheren was frightened,
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦感到害怕，

pairs.target: tā shuōdào ,
pairs.english: and he said,
pairs.hanzi: 他说道，

pairs.target: " wǒ búhuì liúzài zhèlǐ .
pairs.english: "I will not stay here.
pairs.hanzi: “我不会留在这里。

pairs.target: rúguǒ nǐ dāngchū hé wǒ yìqǐ líkāi wǒmen de
pairs.english: If you had come away with me from our
pairs.hanzi: 如果你当初和我一起离开我们的

pairs.target: jiāyuán , qù wǎngnánfāng , wǒmen yěxǔ kěyǐ yìzhí zài yìqǐ ,
pairs.english: Hearth into the southern lands we might have stayed
pairs.hanzi: 家园，去往南方，我们也许可以一直在一起，

pairs.target: zhōngshēng jiānshǒu wǒmen de shìyán ,
pairs.english: together and kept our vow lifelong,
pairs.hanzi: 终生坚守我们的誓言，

pairs.target: wúrénzhīxiǎo wǒmen de guòcuò .
pairs.english: no man knowing our transgression.
pairs.hanzi: 无人知晓我们的过错。

pairs.target: dàn nǐ wéibèi le shìyán ,
pairs.english: But you broke your vow,
pairs.hanzi: 但你违背了誓言，

pairs.target: yòng nǐ de shēngmìng pāoqì le tā .
pairs.english: throwing it away with your life.
pairs.hanzi: 用你的生命抛弃了它。

pairs.target: ér xiànzài nǐ lián wǒ de míngzì dōu shuōbùchūlái . "
pairs.english: And now you cannot say my name."
pairs.hanzi: 而现在你连我的名字都说不出来。”

pairs.target: zhè shì zhēnde .
pairs.english: This was true.
pairs.hanzi: 这是真的。

pairs.target: huò dé dòngledòng tā nà báisè de zuǐchún ,
pairs.english: Hode moved his white lips,
pairs.hanzi: 霍德动了动他那白色的嘴唇，

pairs.target: què wúfǎ shuōchū tā xiōngdì de míngzì .
pairs.english: but could not say his brother's name.
pairs.hanzi: 却无法说出他兄弟的名字。

pairs.target: tā xùnsù cháo gé sè lún zǒulái , shēnchū shuāngbì
pairs.english: He came quickly to Getheren reaching out his arms
pairs.hanzi: 他迅速朝格瑟伦走来，伸出双臂

pairs.target: xiǎngyào bàozhù tā ,
pairs.english: to hold him,
pairs.hanzi: 想要抱住他，

pairs.target: zhuāzhù le tā de zuǒshǒu .
pairs.english: and seized him by the left hand.
pairs.hanzi: 抓住了他的左手。

pairs.target: gé sè lún zhèngtuō kāilái , táolí le tā .
pairs.english: Getheren broke free and ran from him.
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦挣脱开来，逃离了他。

pairs.target: tā xiàng nán bēn qù ,
pairs.english: He ran to the southward,
pairs.hanzi: 他向南奔去，

pairs.target: zài bēnpǎo zhōng , tā kàndào qiánfāng shēngqǐ yídào báisè de
pairs.english: and running saw rise up before him a white
pairs.hanzi: 在奔跑中，他看到前方升起一道白色的

pairs.target: fēnfēi de xuě qiáng ,
pairs.english: wall of falling snow,
pairs.hanzi: 纷飞的雪墙，

pairs.target: dāng tā chōng jìn xuě qiáng shí , tā yòu dǎoxià le
pairs.english: and when he entered into it he fell again
pairs.hanzi: 当他冲进雪墙时，他又倒下了

pairs.target: guìdǎo zài dì ,
pairs.english: on his knees,
pairs.hanzi: 跪倒在地，

pairs.target: wúfǎ zài pǎo , zhǐnéng páxíng .
pairs.english: and could not run, but crawled.
pairs.hanzi: 无法再跑，只能爬行。

pairs.target: tā shàng bīngyuán hòu de dìjiǔtiān ,
pairs.english: On the ninth day after he had gone up
pairs.hanzi: 他上冰原后的第九天，

pairs.target: zài tāmen de lǐngdì shàng bèi rén fāxiàn ,
pairs.english: on the Ice he was found in their Domain
pairs.hanzi: 在他们的领地上被人发现，

pairs.target: shì bèi ào huò hè jiāwū de rén zhǎodào de ,
pairs.english: bypeople of Orhoch Hearth,
pairs.hanzi: 是被奥霍赫家屋的人找到的，

pairs.target: ào huò hè jiāwū wèiyú shā sī dōngběi .
pairs.english: which lies northeast of Shath.
pairs.hanzi: 奥霍赫家屋位于沙斯东北。

pairs.target: tāmen bù zhīdào tā shì shuí , yě bù zhīdào
pairs.english: They did not know who he was nor where
pairs.hanzi: 他们不知道他是谁，也不知道

pairs.target: tā láizì héfāng ,
pairs.english: he came from,
pairs.hanzi: 他来自何方，

pairs.target: yīnwèi tāmen fāxiàn tā zài xuědì lǐ páxíng ,
pairs.english: for they found him crawling in the snow,
pairs.hanzi: 因为他们发现他在雪地里爬行，

pairs.target: jīè , xuěmáng , liǎn bèi tàiyáng hé hánshuāng shàihēi ,
pairs.english: starving, snow-blind, his face blackened by sun and frost,
pairs.hanzi: 饥饿、雪盲，脸被太阳和寒霜晒黑，

pairs.target: qǐchū tā shènzhì wúfǎ shuōhuà .
pairs.english: and at first he could not speak.
pairs.hanzi: 起初他甚至无法说话。

pairs.target: dàn chúle
pairs.english: Yet he took no lasting harm except in his
pairs.hanzi: 但除了

pairs.target: zuǒshǒu dònghuài xūyào jiézhī zhīwài , tā méiyǒu liúxià qítā hòuyízhèng .
pairs.english: left hand, which was frozen and must be amputated.
pairs.hanzi: 左手冻坏需要截肢之外，他没有留下其他后遗症。

pairs.target: yǒuxiē rén shuō zhè rén shì shā sī de gé sè lún ,
pairs.english: Some of the people there said this was Getheren
pairs.hanzi: 有些人说这人是沙斯的格瑟伦，

alignment.target: shā sī de gé sè lún

pairs.target: tāmen céng tīngshuō guò tā ;
pairs.english: of Shath, of whom they had heard talk;
pairs.hanzi: 他们曾听说过他；

pairs.target: yě yǒurén shuō bù kěnéng ,
pairs.english: others said it could not be,
pairs.hanzi: 也有人说不可能，

pairs.target: yīnwèi gé sè lún zǎoyǐ shàng le bīngyuán ,
pairs.english: for that Getheren had gone up on the Ice
pairs.hanzi: 因为格瑟伦早已上了冰原，

pairs.target: zài qiūtiān de dìyīchǎng bàofēngxuě zhōng ,
pairs.english: in the first blizzard of autumn,
pairs.hanzi: 在秋天的第一场暴风雪中，

pairs.target: kěndìng yǐjīng sǐ le .
pairs.english: and was certainly dead.
pairs.hanzi: 肯定已经死了。

pairs.target: tā zìjǐ fǒurèn zìjǐ jiào gé sè lún .
pairs.english: He himself denied that his name was Getheren.
pairs.hanzi: 他自己否认自己叫格瑟伦。

pairs.target: tā kāngfù hòu líkāi le ào huò hè hé
pairs.english: When he was well he left Orhoch and the
pairs.hanzi: 他康复后离开了奥霍赫和

pairs.target: fēngbào biānjìng , qiánwǎng nánfāng de tǔdì ,
pairs.english: Storm-border and went into the southern lands,
pairs.hanzi: 风暴边境，前往南方的土地，

pairs.target: zìchēng ēn nuò hè .
pairs.english: calling himself Ennoch.
pairs.hanzi: 自称恩诺赫。

pairs.target: dāng ēn nuò hè niánlǎo shí , zhù zài
pairs.english: When Ennoch was an old man dwelling in the
pairs.hanzi: 当恩诺赫年老时，住在

pairs.target: léi ěr píngyuán shàng , tā yùdào le yíwèi láizì
pairs.english: plains of Rer he met a man from his
pairs.hanzi: 雷尔平原上，他遇到了一位来自

pairs.target: zìjǐ gùxiāng de rén , bìng wèndào ,
pairs.english: own country, and asked him,
pairs.hanzi: 自己故乡的人，并问道，

pairs.target: " shā sī lǐngdì jìnkuàng rúhé ? " nà rén gàosù tā ,
pairs.english: "How fares Shath Domain?" The other told him that
pairs.hanzi: “沙斯领地近况如何？”那人告诉他，

pairs.target: shā sī de qíngkuàng hěnzāo .
pairs.english: Shath fared ill.
pairs.hanzi: 沙斯的情况很糟。

pairs.target: nàlǐ wúlùn jiāwū háishì tiándì dōu méiyǒu xīngwàng ,
pairs.english: Nothing prospered there in hearth or tilth,
pairs.hanzi: 那里无论家屋还是田地都没有兴旺，

pairs.target: yíqiè dōu yīn jíbìng ér kūwěi ,
pairs.english: all being blighted with illness,
pairs.hanzi: 一切都因疾病而枯萎，

pairs.target: chūntiān de zhǒngzi dòng zài tǔ lǐ , huòzhě
pairs.english: the spring seed frozen in the ground or the
pairs.hanzi: 春天的种子冻在土里，或者

pairs.target: chéngshú de gǔwù fǔlàn ,
pairs.english: ripe grain rotten,
pairs.hanzi: 成熟的谷物腐烂，

pairs.target: duōnián lái yìzhí rúcǐ .
pairs.english: and so it had been for many years.
pairs.hanzi: 多年来一直如此。

pairs.target: yúshì ēn nuò hè gàosù tā ,
pairs.english: Then Ennoch told him,
pairs.hanzi: 于是恩诺赫告诉他，

pairs.target: " wǒ shì shā sī de gé sè lún ,
pairs.english: "I am Getheren of Shath,
pairs.hanzi: “我是沙斯的格瑟伦，

pairs.target: " bìng gàosù tā zìjǐ rúhé shàng le
pairs.english: " and told him how he had gone up
pairs.hanzi: ”并告诉他自己如何上了

pairs.target: bīngyuán , yǐjí zài nàlǐ yùdào de shìqíng ,
pairs.english: on the Ice and what he had met with
pairs.hanzi: 冰原，以及在那里遇到的事情，

pairs.target: gùshì jiǎngwán hòu tā shuō ,
pairs.english: there. At the end of his tale he said,
pairs.hanzi: 故事讲完后他说，

pairs.target: " qǐng gàosù shā sī de rén , wǒ shōuhuí wǒ de
pairs.english: "Tell them at Shath that I take back my
pairs.hanzi: “请告诉沙斯的人，我收回我的

pairs.target: míngzì hé wǒ de yǐngzi . " méiguòduōjiǔ ,
pairs.english: name and my shadow." Not many days after this
pairs.hanzi: 名字和我的影子。”没过多久，

pairs.target: gé sè lún biàn shēngbìng qùshì le .
pairs.english: Getheren took sick and died.
pairs.hanzi: 格瑟伦便生病去世了。

pairs.target: nàwèi lǚrén bǎ tā dehuà dàihuí le shā sī ,
pairs.english: The traveler carried his words back to Shath,
pairs.hanzi: 那位旅人把他的话带回了沙斯，

pairs.target: jùshuō cóngnàyǐhòu ,
pairs.english: and they say that from that time on the
pairs.hanzi: 据说从那以后，

pairs.target: lǐngdì zàicì fánróng qǐlái ,
pairs.english: domain prospered again,
pairs.hanzi: 领地再次繁荣起来，

pairs.target: tiándì lǐ yíqiè rúcháng ,
pairs.english: and all went as it should go in field
pairs.hanzi: 田地里一切如常，

pairs.target: jiāwū hé lúbiān yě dōu huīfù le zhèngcháng .
pairs.english: and house and hearth.
pairs.hanzi: 家屋和炉边也都恢复了正常。

meta.synopsis: A traditional Gethenian hearth-tale recounts the tragic story of two brothers who break social taboos, leading to exile, supernatural encounters, and eventual redemption. The tale explores themes of shame, identity, and the power of names.
